verses.latin_vulgate: Onus verbi Domini in terra Hadrach  et Damasci requiei ejus,  quia Domini est oculus hominis et omnium tribuum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשָּׂ֤א דְבַר־יְהֹוָה֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חַדְרָ֔ךְ וְדַמֶּ֖שֶׂק מְנֻחָת֑וֹ כִּ֤י לַֽיהֹוָה֙ עֵ֣ין אָדָ֔ם וְכֹ֖ל שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: The burden of the word of the Lord in the land of Hadrach, and Damascus shall be the rest thereof: when the eyes of man, as of all the tribes of Israel, shall be toward the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Emath quoque in terminis ejus, et Tyrus, et Sidon :  assumpserunt quippe sibi sapientiam valde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־חֲמָ֖ת תִּגְבׇּל־בָּ֑הּ צֹ֣ר וְצִיד֔וֹן כִּ֥י חָֽכְמָ֖ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: And Hamath also shall border thereby; Tyrus, and Zidon, though it be very wise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ædificavit Tyrus munitionem suam,  et coacervavit argentum quasi humum,  et aurum ut lutum platearum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּ֥בֶן צֹ֛ר מָצ֖וֹר לָ֑הּ וַתִּצְבׇּר־כֶּ֙סֶף֙ כֶּֽעָפָ֔ר וְחָר֖וּץ כְּטִ֥יט חוּצֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And Tyrus did build herself a strong hold, and heaped up silver as the dust, and fine gold as the mire of the streets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce Dominus possidebit eam :  et percutiet in mari fortitudinem ejus,  et hæc igni devorabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה אֲדֹנָי֙ יֽוֹרִשֶׁ֔נָּה וְהִכָּ֥ה בַיָּ֖ם חֵילָ֑הּ וְהִ֖יא בָּאֵ֥שׁ תֵּאָכֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the Lord will cast her out, and he will smite her power in the sea; and she shall be devoured with fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videbit Ascalon, et timebit,  et Gaza, et dolebit nimis,  et Accaron, quoniam confusa est spes ejus :  et peribit rex de Gaza,  et Ascalon non habitabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֵּרֶ֨א אַשְׁקְל֜וֹן וְתִירָ֗א וְעַזָּה֙ וְתָחִ֣יל מְאֹ֔ד וְעֶקְר֖וֹן כִּֽי־הֹבִ֣ישׁ מֶבָּטָ֑הּ וְאָ֤בַד מֶ֙לֶךְ֙ מֵֽעַזָּ֔ה וְאַשְׁקְל֖וֹן לֹ֥א תֵשֵֽׁב׃
verses.king_james: Ashkelon shall see it, and fear; Gaza also shall see it, and be very sorrowful, and Ekron; for her expectation shall be ashamed; and the king shall perish from Gaza, and Ashkelon shall not be inhabited.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sedebit separator in Azoto,  et disperdam superbiam Philisthinorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָשַׁ֥ב מַמְזֵ֖ר בְּאַשְׁדּ֑וֹד וְהִכְרַתִּ֖י גְּא֥וֹן פְּלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: And a bastard shall dwell in Ashdod, and I will cut off the pride of the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auferam sanguinem ejus de ore ejus,  et abominationes ejus de medio dentium ejus :  et relinquetur etiam ipse Deo nostro,  et erit quasi dux in Juda,  et Accaron quasi Jebusæus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲסִרֹתִ֨י דָמָ֜יו מִפִּ֗יו וְשִׁקֻּצָיו֙ מִבֵּ֣ין שִׁנָּ֔יו וְנִשְׁאַ֥ר גַּם־ה֖וּא לֵֽאלֹהֵ֑ינוּ וְהָיָה֙ כְּאַלֻּ֣ף בִּֽיהוּדָ֔ה וְעֶקְר֖וֹן כִּיבוּסִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And I will take away his blood out of his mouth, and his abominations from between his teeth: but he that remaineth, even he, shall be for our God, and he shall be as a governor in Judah, and Ekron as a Jebusite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et circumdabo domum meam  ex his qui militant mihi euntes et revertentes :  et non transibit super eos ultra exactor,  quia nunc vidi in oculis meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָנִ֨יתִי לְבֵיתִ֤י מִצָּבָה֙ מֵעֹבֵ֣ר וּמִשָּׁ֔ב וְלֹֽא־יַעֲבֹ֧ר עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם ע֖וֹד נֹגֵ֑שׂ כִּ֥י עַתָּ֖ה רָאִ֥יתִי בְעֵינָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And I will encamp about mine house because of the army, because of him that passeth by, and because of him that returneth: and no oppressor shall pass through them any more: for now have I seen with mine eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsulta satis, filia Sion ;  jubila, filia Jerusalem :  ecce rex tuus veniet tibi justus, et salvator :  ipse pauper, et ascendens super asinam  et super pullum filium asinæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גִּילִ֨י מְאֹ֜ד בַּת־צִיּ֗וֹן הָרִ֙יעִי֙ בַּ֣ת יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם הִנֵּ֤ה מַלְכֵּךְ֙ יָ֣בוֹא לָ֔ךְ צַדִּ֥יק וְנוֹשָׁ֖ע ה֑וּא עָנִי֙ וְרֹכֵ֣ב עַל־חֲמ֔וֹר וְעַל־עַ֖יִר בֶּן־אֲתֹנֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Rejoice greatly, O daughter of Zion; shout, O daughter of Jerusalem: behold, thy King cometh unto thee: he is just, and having salvation; lowly, and riding upon an ass, and upon a colt the foal of an ass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et disperdam quadrigam ex Ephraim,  et equum de Jerusalem,  et dissipabitur arcus belli :  et loquetur pacem gentibus,  et potestas ejus a mari usque ad mare,  et a fluminibus usque ad fines terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִכְרַתִּי־רֶ֣כֶב מֵאֶפְרַ֗יִם וְסוּס֙ מִיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם וְנִכְרְתָה֙ קֶ֣שֶׁת מִלְחָמָ֔ה וְדִבֶּ֥ר שָׁל֖וֹם לַגּוֹיִ֑ם וּמׇשְׁלוֹ֙ מִיָּ֣ם עַד־יָ֔ם וּמִנָּהָ֖ר עַד־אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And I will cut off the chariot from Ephraim, and the horse from Jerusalem, and the battle bow shall be cut off: and he shall speak peace unto the heathen: and his dominion shall be from sea even to sea, and from the river even to the ends of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu quoque in sanguine testamenti tui  emisisti vinctos tuos de lacu in quo non est aqua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אַ֣תְּ בְּדַם־בְּרִיתֵ֗ךְ שִׁלַּ֤חְתִּי אֲסִירַ֙יִךְ֙ מִבּ֔וֹר אֵ֥ין מַ֖יִם בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: As for thee also, by the blood of thy covenant I have sent forth thy prisoners out of the pit wherein is no water.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertimini ad munitionem, vincti spei :  hodie quoque annuntians duplicia reddam tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁ֚וּבוּ לְבִצָּר֔וֹן אֲסִירֵ֖י הַתִּקְוָ֑ה גַּם־הַיּ֕וֹם מַגִּ֥יד מִשְׁנֶ֖ה אָשִׁ֥יב לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Turn you to the strong hold, ye prisoners of hope: even to day do I declare that I will render double unto thee;

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam extendi mihi Judam quasi arcum :  implevi Ephraim :  et suscitabo filios tuos, Sion,  super filios tuos, Græcia :  et ponam te quasi gladium fortium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־דָרַ֨כְתִּי לִ֜י יְהוּדָ֗ה קֶ֚שֶׁת מִלֵּ֣אתִי אֶפְרַ֔יִם וְעוֹרַרְתִּ֤י בָנַ֙יִךְ֙ צִיּ֔וֹן עַל־בָּנַ֖יִךְ יָוָ֑ן וְשַׂמְתִּ֖יךְ כְּחֶ֥רֶב גִּבּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: When I have bent Judah for me, filled the bow with Ephraim, and raised up thy sons, O Zion, against thy sons, O Greece, and made thee as the sword of a mighty man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Dominus Deus super eos videbitur,  et exibit ut fulgur jaculum ejus :  et Dominus Deus in tuba canet,  et vadet in turbine austri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיהֹוָה֙ עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם יֵֽרָאֶ֔ה וְיָצָ֥א כַבָּרָ֖ק חִצּ֑וֹ וַֽאדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ בַּשּׁוֹפָ֣ר יִתְקָ֔ע וְהָלַ֖ךְ בְּסַעֲר֥וֹת תֵּימָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord shall be seen over them, and his arrow shall go forth as the lightning: and the Lord God shall blow the trumpet, and shall go with whirlwinds of the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus exercituum proteget eos :  et devorabunt, et subjicient lapidibus fundæ :  et bibentes inebriabuntur quasi a vino,  et replebuntur ut phialæ,  et quasi cornua altaris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָאוֹת֮ יָגֵ֣ן עֲלֵיהֶם֒ וְאָכְל֗וּ וְכָֽבְשׁוּ֙ אַבְנֵי־קֶ֔לַע וְשָׁת֥וּ הָמ֖וּ כְּמוֹ־יָ֑יִן וּמָֽלְאוּ֙ כַּמִּזְרָ֔ק כְּזָוִיּ֖וֹת מִזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord of hosts shall defend them; and they shall devour, and subdue with sling stones; and they shall drink, and make a noise as through wine; and they shall be filled like bowls, and as the corners of the altar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et salvabit eos Dominus Deus eorum in die illa,  ut gregem populi sui,  quia lapides sancti elevabuntur super terram ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהוֹשִׁיעָ֞ם יְהֹוָ֧ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֛ם בַּיּ֥וֹם הַה֖וּא כְּצֹ֣אן עַמּ֑וֹ כִּ֚י אַבְנֵי־נֵ֔זֶר מִֽתְנוֹסְס֖וֹת עַל־אַדְמָתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord their God shall save them in that day as the flock of his people: for they shall be as the stones of a crown, lifted up as an ensign upon his land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid enim bonum ejus est,  et quid pulchrum ejus,  nisi frumentum electorum,  et vinum germinans virgines ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י מַה־טּוּב֖וֹ וּמַה־יׇּפְי֑וֹ דָּגָן֙ בַּחוּרִ֔ים וְתִיר֖וֹשׁ יְנוֹבֵ֥ב בְּתֻלֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: For how great is his goodness, and how great is his beauty! corn shall make the young men cheerful, and new wine the maids.
